from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicate_pivot_values():
    """Test that duplicate pivot values are not lost."""
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = quicksort(arr)
    assert len(result) == len(arr), f"Length mismatch: expected {len(arr)}, got {len(result)}"
    assert result == sorted(arr), f"Expected {sorted(arr)}, got {result}"
